title: phyllanthus nitens
intro: Phyllanthus nitens, also known as the green gold or golden shower tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus nitens include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
